default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Cresta and growthx.ai for AI-driven content marketing and SEO services.](https://fathom.video/share/Shz213JLUue5zAhqJnc15asSnErgrcbA?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [growthx.ai offers end-to-end AI-powered content marketing services, including strategy, execution, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/Shz213JLUue5zAhqJnc15asSnErgrcbA?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [Pricing starts at $15k/month after an initial 8-week $30k engagement](https://fathom.video/share/Shz213JLUue5zAhqJnc15asSnErgrcbA?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [Russell expressed interest but needs to find budget; Marcel open to some pricing flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/Shz213JLUue5zAhqJnc15asSnErgrcbA?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
  - [Key value prop: optimizing for both traditional SEO and emerging AI/LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/Shz213JLUue5zAhqJnc15asSnErgrcbA?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)

## Topics

### growthx.ai's Service Overview

  - [AI-driven content creation engine with custom knowledge bases and execution pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/Shz213JLUue5zAhqJnc15asSnErgrcbA?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [Services include strategy sprints, content production, SEO optimization, newsletters, and more](https://fathom.video/share/Shz213JLUue5zAhqJnc15asSnErgrcbA?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Emphasis on understanding client context, audience mapping, and content "OS" development](https://fathom.video/share/Shz213JLUue5zAhqJnc15asSnErgrcbA?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Leverages coding agents to build custom workflows for each client](https://fathom.video/share/Shz213JLUue5zAhqJnc15asSnErgrcbA?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)

### Case Studies and Results

  - [Clients include Ramp, Augment Code, Udemy, Abnormal Security](https://fathom.video/share/Shz213JLUue5zAhqJnc15asSnErgrcbA?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [For Engine.com: 32 pieces published, 5 ready to publish, 10 in review after 8 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/Shz213JLUue5zAhqJnc15asSnErgrcbA?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
  - [Webstacks.com seeing 60% additional traffic from LLM referrals, converting 5x better to demos](https://fathom.video/share/Shz213JLUue5zAhqJnc15asSnErgrcbA?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)

### Pricing and Engagement Model

  - [Standard: $15k/month](https://fathom.video/share/Shz213JLUue5zAhqJnc15asSnErgrcbA?tab=summary&timestamp=1555.0)
  - [Initial 8-week engagement at $30k total](https://fathom.video/share/Shz213JLUue5zAhqJnc15asSnErgrcbA?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [Some flexibility based on content complexity, review process, volume](https://fathom.video/share/Shz213JLUue5zAhqJnc15asSnErgrcbA?tab=summary&timestamp=1623.0)
  - [Range of $9k-$230k/month across clients, most between $12k-$30k](https://fathom.video/share/Shz213JLUue5zAhqJnc15asSnErgrcbA?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)

### AI/LLM Optimization Opportunity

  - [Emerging importance of optimizing for AI visibility alongside traditional SEO](https://fathom.video/share/Shz213JLUue5zAhqJnc15asSnErgrcbA?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [Risk of decreased direct website traffic as users rely more on AI assistants](https://fathom.video/share/Shz213JLUue5zAhqJnc15asSnErgrcbA?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
  - [Example: "best AI agents for contact centers" query - critical to appear in AI results](https://fathom.video/share/Shz213JLUue5zAhqJnc15asSnErgrcbA?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)

### Potential Cresta Engagement

  - [Russell expressed interest but needs to find budget](https://fathom.video/share/Shz213JLUue5zAhqJnc15asSnErgrcbA?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
  - [Marcel open to some pricing flexibility given existing relationship/industry knowledge](https://fathom.video/share/Shz213JLUue5zAhqJnc15asSnErgrcbA?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
  - [Initial focus on blog/SEO content for contact center leaders, CIOs](https://fathom.video/share/Shz213JLUue5zAhqJnc15asSnErgrcbA?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Russell to review internally and determine budget availability](https://fathom.video/share/Shz213JLUue5zAhqJnc15asSnErgrcbA?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
  - [Follow up on potential engagement and pricing](https://fathom.video/share/Shz213JLUue5zAhqJnc15asSnErgrcbA?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)
  - [Hold off on Slack integration until engagement begins due to Cresta security policies](https://fathom.video/share/Shz213JLUue5zAhqJnc15asSnErgrcbA?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)

action_items.description: Review GrowthX.ai proposal. Determine budget feasibility. Decide on moving forward with $15k/month (or negotiated) engagement.
